name: lifelongpep-mcp
description: MCP tools for GLP-1 readiness, metabolic longevity consult preparation, and pre-launch lead handoff in India.

tools.name: lifelongpep_get_capabilities
tools.description: Return current lifelongpep status, guardrails, live actions, and planned interfaces.

tools.name: lifelongpep_submit_agent_intake
tools.description: Collect a structured intake summary for a future metabolic longevity or GLP-1 readiness consult.

tools.name: lifelongpep_submit_glp1_consult_request
tools.description: Submit pre-launch interest for doctor-gated GLP-1 readiness consult access.

tools.name: lifelongpep_get_request_status
tools.description: Check the public status of a submitted agent intake or consult request.

guardrails: The MCP server implementation is in the repo but must be installed and connected to the deployed API.
No medical advice, diagnosis, prescription, fulfillment, payment, or live booking is available today.
Agents must disclose that lifelongpep is pre-launch and waitlist-only.
Doctors decide independently after launch. GLP-1 access is not guaranteed.
